title: Add Multiple Displays to MacBook Neo with EZQuest USB 4 Dual Display 8-in-1 Hub Pro Series
body_html:
Add Multiple Displays to MacBook Neo with EZQuest USB 4 Dual Display 8-in-1 Hub Pro Series

April 14, 2026 Ebrahim Zmehrir

Whether for work or for pleasure, having multiple displays is known to help with workflow and productivity. But with computers and laptops getting thinner and thinner every year, like the new MacBook Neo, the devices can lose the ability to do this. EZQuest, makers of high-quality tech accessories, has created a solution—the USB 4 Dual Display 8-in-1 Hub Pro Series. The hub provides extra ports in a pinch and way for users to connect multiple display screens to their setup.

It 8-in-1 has the following features:

  • 3x USB 4 Ports. Each supports 8K video output (30Hz), 10Gbps Gen 2 data, and up to 15W output power.
  • 4x USB-C Gen 2 Ports. Each supports 10Gbps data and 7.5W power output.
  • 1 USB-C PD 3.0 Port. 100 W pass-through charging with Fast Role Swap (FRS) technology. Provides up to 77W to your laptop plus 23W to power connected devices and the hub itself. Total Shared data 10Gbps and 23W shared power.
  • The hub is powered by Intel Hoover Ridge JHL8140 USB4/TB4 Chipset.

Users can also connect one external display up to 8K at 30Hz via any of the 3 USB 4 ports or dual 4K at 60Hz USB-C displays on Windows, Linux, Android and Chrome OS. Mac OS dual display supported on M1, 2, 3 Pro and Max plus all M4, M5 and later chips. The 8-in-1 Pro Series Hub has been tested and confirmed to provide multiple displays for the new MacBook Neo.

For more information and to purchase visit, www.ezq.com or the EZQuest Amazon store.

title: EZQuest Announces New Line of Pro Series USB-C Hubs
body_html:
EZQuest Announces New Line of Pro Series USB-C Hubs

March 18, 2026 Ebrahim Zmehrir

New multimedia hubs provide extra ports in a pinch

Companies are currently in a competition to see how thin and light they can make computers and tablets. The sleek designs could be causing consumers to lose valuable ports on devices that help them multitask. Enter the EZQuest Pro Series USB-C Multimedia Hub Adapters that provide extra ports for additional screens, data transfer and charging.

Available in either 5-in-1, 8-in-1 and 12-in-1 versions, the EZQuest Pro Series hubs are lightweight and compact. They have a streamlined casing and come equipped with a detachable 19.6-inch USB-C or USB 4 cable designed for a clutter-free desk setup. The cable has a nylon braided outer sheath and strain relief design for extra durability. Each Pro Series hub comes with a 2-year warranty.

The standout in the Pro Series lineup is the 8-in-1 ($149.99). It has 3x USB 4 ports, 4x USB-C Gen 2 ports and a USB-C PD port. Users can also connect one external display up to 8K at 30Hz via any of the 3 USB 4 ports or dual 4K at 60Hz USB-C displays on Windows, Linux, Android and Chrome OS. Mac OS dual display supported on M1, 2, 3 Pro and Max plus all M4, M5 and later chips. The hub is powered by Intel Hoover Ridge JHL8140 USB4/TB4 Chipset.

The Pro Series Hubs are also available in:

  • 5-in-1 ($35.99) comes equipped with a USB-A 3.0 port, a USB-C Power Delivery (PD) 3.0 port, 2x USB-A 2.0 ports and a HDMI 4K 60Hz port to connect one external display. The hub is available in two colors, Space Black and White.

  • 12-in-1 ($89.99) features 2x USB-C ports, 3x USB-A ports, ethernet connection with LED indicator, a SDHC card reader and a Micro SDHC 3.0 card reader, a 3.5mm audio jack with microphone support, a USB-C PD 3.0 port and two HDMI 4K 60Hz ports.

For more information and to purchase visit, www.ezq.com or the EZQuest Amazon store.

About EZQuest

Founded in 1994, EZQuest manufactures the highest-quality accessories for the PC and mobile consumer electronics markets. The company’s product line includes a variety of USB-C Hubs, Docks, Cables, Adapters, and Power. EZQuest uses the latest technology for all its USB Type-C products, built for durability and stylish design. For more information visit: www.ezq.com

Cassandra Weller
Asylum PR
Cassandra@asylumpr.com
610-297-1047

title: Unclutter Your Desk With Help From EZQuest
body_html:
Unclutter Your Desk With Help From EZQuest

February 12, 2026 Ebrahim Zmehrir

It’s almost that time of year again to start thinking about the items you want to tackle and organize for spring cleaning. There’s one area of your house or office that needs immediate attention—your desk.

USB-C hubs are a popular piece of hardware that most people own and have on their desks, but as anyone can tell you, the cable that comes attached to it always too short or in some cases can be way too long. It’s typical for people to have cables strewn across their desks and crisscrossing over the tabletop due to this, but this year that all stops. EZQuest has come up with a solution to this problem—detachable cords for its UBS-C hubs.

The new EZQuest Pro Series hubs (5-in-1, 8-in-1 and 12-in-1) come with a detachable 19.6-inch USB 4 cable designed for the best clutter-free desk set up. The cord is long enough to allow you to set up your desk how you want without there being excess cord taking up your desk space. EZQuest also designed the hubs this way to make them easier to travel with as the cord doesn’t need to be attached to the hub, allowing you to pack your items flat.

Another great option EZQuest offers is the USB-C Slim Gen 2 Hub Adapter 6-in-1 as it also comes with a detachable 19.6-inch nylon braided cable.

title: Throw Out Your Cheap Cables, and Replace Them with EZQuest Cables
body_html:
Throw Out Your Cheap Cables, and Replace Them with EZQuest Cables

January 30, 2026 Ebrahim Zmehrir

Cables are one of those items that we just cannot escape as we need them to recharge our electronic devices as well as connecting TVs and gaming systems. Most of us have picked up cheap, flimsy cables from the checkout line in a store or just blindly chose one off the shelf. But quality matters, especially when it comes to how the cable is made. Most have a flimsy outer sheath that cracks or breaks, leaving the inner wires exposed. It is also not uncommon to have the cables crap out on you after a few months use. EZQuest cables are engineered for extreme durability and heavy everyday use that can withstand any twist, tug or tangle with 50,000 bends lifespan. The cables are reinforced with Kevlar that wraps around the outer cable as well as through the center of each inner cables core. Each cable has a strain relief design that has a thick, but bendable, barrier to protect it from breaking. Other cables often break in this area due to not enough support. EZQuest also uses the same high-quality strain relief in their new Pro Series Hubs for extra support.

Below we take a look at some of EZQuest’s cables and what makes them stand out.

DuraGuard USB-C Right Angled Charge & Sync 100W 1.2 Meter Black Cable

This USB-C cable has a right angled 90-degrees design, which makes the USB-C to USB-C cable minimize strain by reducing bending stress and extending cable lifespan. The Right Angled Charge & Sync cable also has a nylon braided outer sheath, strain relief and strong aluminum connector housing, for a quality cable that will last.

Buy now for $15.99.

Ultra HD High Speed Certified HDMI Cables

EZQuest HDMI cables are available in either 8K 60Hz or 4K 60Hz and both are certified. The HDMI cables also have a braided outer sheath, strain relief and a strong aluminum connector housing. As an added bonus, both cables are 6.5 feet long, so you don’t have to worry about stretching the cable to reach the ports.

Buy the 8K version for $24.99 or the 4K version for $19.99.

DuraGuard Coiled USB-C Charge & Sync 100W 1.5 Meter Black Cable

The Coiled USB-C cable provides the perfect way of connecting your devices without having a tangled cable mess. The Coiled USB-C Charge & Sync cable is reinforced with Kevlar that is placed through the inner core of the cable as well as strain relief and strong aluminum connector housings.

Buy now for $19.99.

title: Boost Your Work From Home Set Up with Help from EZQuest

Boost Your Work From Home Set Up with Help from EZQuest

The pandemic has changed how people work. Roughly 22-35 million U.S. adults work remotely all or part of the time now. Not being in office and having access to every piece of office equipment you need can be a headache, but with a few tweaks here and there and some hi-tech accessories you can recreate your perfect work set up at home.

title: Get Ahead of Holiday Travel with Packing Tips from EZQuest
body_html:
Get Ahead of Holiday Travel with Packing Tips from EZQuest

October 22, 2025 Ebrahim Zmehrir

The hectic holiday travel season kicks off next month and one of the best things you can do for yourself, and your trip is to plan ahead and get your packing checklist done. Below are helpful tips from the EZQuest team to help you with the process.

  • Make a list and check it twice. The easiest way to make sure you pack everything you need and don’t forget anything is to make a list. Sort the list by if the item is going into your checked bag or carry-on bag. The list can also help you visualize what you are packing and if you need to eliminate anything that you doubled up on.
  • Travel tools can be helpful. Packing cubes, toiletry bags and Ziplock bags can be your best friend while packing. Packing cubes are perfect for grouping and compressing items together to help with space, toiletry bags can help keep cosmetics and other related items together (look for a waterproof bag to help contain spills if there happens to be one) and Ziplock bags are perfect for organizing small items you don’t want to get lost in your bag.
  • Don’t forget the necessities. During the rush of packing, it’s not uncommon to forget the daily necessities like your toothbrush, toothpaste, hairbrush, deodorant and other items. Make sure you pack these first and if you need to use them day of, set a reminder on your phone to pack them. It also doesn’t hurt to already scout out locations by your hotel or Airbnb where you can pick these items up in case you do forget them, or you need to pick up additional supplies.
  • Streamline your chargers. Chargers are one of those tech items that we can’t escape as we constantly need extra battery life for phones, tablets, laptops, cameras and other gadgets. But instead of having a hundred different chargers to pack and rely on, swap them out for EZQuest WorldTravel 35W and 65W chargers. The chargers are designed with 4 different plug types that could plug into the sockets of 200+ countries and regions and can charge up to 6 devices simultaneously (1x AC Socket, 4x USB-C and 1x USB-A).
  • Plan your outfits. To help prevent packing too many clothes (which we all are guilty of!), plan your outfits so that you’re not just tossing random shirts and pants into your suitcase. It also helps to find items in your wardrobe that you can layer or wear more than once during your trip. Try to wear the bulkiest pieces of clothes like sweaters or jackets, on the plane so that you can free up space in your suitcase.

title: EZQuest Celebrating 31 Years of Connections
body_html:
EZQuest Celebrating 31 Years of Connections

September 30, 2025 Ebrahim Zmehrir

EZQuest was founded in 1994 and is celebrating 31 years of connections this year. The company manufactures the highest-quality accessories for PC and mobile consumer electronics market.

EZQuest has received accolades over the years for its product designs. MacWorld, Consumers Digest, Animation Magazine, PC Mag and MacAddict are just some of the publications that have given EZQuest awards.

The company provides precision-engineered USB type C products as well as the highest level of customer service over the years. EZQuest uses the latest technology for all USB type C products, built for durability and stylish design.

EZQuest has evolved to now include the latest USB-C hubs including the new USB-C Slim Gen 2 Hub Adapter 6-in-1 as well as the company’s first Magnetic USB-C M.2 NVMe SSD Enclosure. The company also offers a wide range of cables including DuraGuard USB4 V2 1.2 Meter Cables as well as Ultra HD High Speed Certified HDMI 8K 60Hz 2 Meter Cables.

“I’m beyond excited to be celebrating 31 years of connections with EZQuest this year,” said Ebrahim Zmehrir, CEO of EZQuest. “To step back and look where we’ve come from has been incredible. There’s no greater joy I get than hearing back from customers and how they are satisfied. We look forward to the next 31 years and bringing consumers the latest and greatest gadgets.”

Consumers can look forward to new USB-C hubs, cables and chargers (is this right? And are there any more details about these products that I can share as a sneak peek?) from the company in the upcoming months. Visit EZQ.com to learn more and to sign up for the latest updates from the company.

title: EZQuest Products for a Successful School Year
